title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch with modern HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and deployment workflows.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Build user-centered interfaces, wireframes, and polished product flows with design systems and modern prototyping methods.

title: Digital Marketing Accelerator
description: Discover SEO, content strategy, email funnels, paid ads, and analytics to grow brands with measurable results.

title: Productivity for Remote Teams
description: Master async collaboration, focus systems, planning rituals, and performance habits for distributed learning and work.

title: Data Analytics with Excel and SQL
description: Analyze business data with Excel dashboards, SQL queries, reporting techniques, and practical decision-making exercises.

title: Brand Strategy for Creators
description: Shape a memorable creator brand through messaging, content pillars, audience research, and visual consistency.

title: Advanced React Patterns
description: Level up component architecture, performance, routing patterns, and state design for production-scale React apps.

title: Motion Graphics Essentials
description: Create energetic visuals, transitions, and promotional scenes for social media, products, and digital storytelling.
